scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('artifacts', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: npm run generate:registry && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run stage:plugin-artifact && npm run sync:plugin-package-json && npm run generate:plugin-manifest && npm run validate:plugin
scripts.build:watch: npm run generate:registry && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch
